tasks.subject: Task 0: Leaderboard renderer migration + .empty-hint size modifiers + 8 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append `.leaderboard-row/-rank/-name/-wins` + `.empty-hint--lg/--sm` rules to `03-game.css`; swap the 7 `.style.cssText` writes in `loadLeaderboard` (`app.js:614-650`) for `className` assignments; drop the dead `#94a3b8` fallback; new file-content test file pins the migration's post-state.

**Files:**
- Modify: `public/css/03-game.css` (append 6 rules at EOF)
- Modify: `public/js/app.js:609-654`
- Create: `client-tests/leaderboard-render.test.js` (~8 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 6 new CSS rules in 03-game.css
- app.js loadLeaderboard has zero .style.cssText writes
- No dead #94a3b8 fallback in loadLeaderboard
- 8 new tests pass
- Sacrosanct test files unchanged
- Suite 592 → 600 green

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/leaderboard-render.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent` → 8 green, 600 total.

**Steps:** TDD — write failing test file FIRST, verify RED, then append rules + edit app.js, verify GREEN, commit. Full code in plan T0 Steps 1-5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/03-game.css", "public/js/app.js", "client-tests/leaderboard-render.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/leaderboard-render.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 new rules in 03-game.css (.empty-hint--lg, .empty-hint--sm, .leaderboard-row, .leaderboard-rank, .leaderboard-name, .leaderboard-wins)", "app.js loadLeaderboard has zero .style.cssText writes", "app.js loadLeaderboard has no #94a3b8 dead fallback", "8 new tests pass", "Sacrosanct test files unchanged", "Suite 592 -> 600 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Empty-hint cleanup (3 cssText sites + 1 innerHTML inline-style site) + 5 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append `.join-public-btn` rule to `02-hero-lobby.css`; remove `joinButton.style.cssText` at `socketClient.js:193` AND migrate the 'No open lobbies' `innerHTML` template at `socketClient.js:115` to use `.empty-hint empty-hint--lg`; migrate `ui-panels.js:190` (stats-empty) to `.empty-hint empty-hint--lg`; migrate `ui-panels.js:396` (daily-lb-empty) to `.empty-hint empty-hint--sm`. T0's modifier classes are reused.

**Files:**
- Modify: `public/css/02-hero-lobby.css` (append 1 rule)
- Modify: `public/js/socketClient.js:115` and `:193`
- Modify: `public/js/ui/ui-panels.js:190` and `:396`
- Create: `client-tests/empty-hint-migration.test.js` (~5 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 1 new .join-public-btn rule in 02-hero-lobby.css
- Zero joinButton.style.cssText in socketClient.js
- socketClient.js:115 'No open lobbies' innerHTML uses .empty-hint empty-hint--lg with no inline style
- renderMyStats empty case uses .empty-hint.empty-hint--lg, no inline style (DOM test via import)
- renderDailyResult empty case uses .empty-hint.empty-hint--sm, no inline style
- 5 new tests pass
- Sacrosanct test files unchanged
- Suite 600 → 605 green

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/empty-hint-migration.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent` → 5 green, 605 total.

**Steps:** TDD — write failing test file FIRST, verify RED, then append .join-public-btn rule + edit socketClient.js (2 sites) + edit ui-panels.js (2 sites), verify GREEN, commit. Full code in plan T1 Steps 1-5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/02-hero-lobby.css", "public/js/socketClient.js", "public/js/ui/ui-panels.js", "client-tests/empty-hint-migration.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/empty-hint-migration.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["1 new .join-public-btn rule in 02-hero-lobby.css", "Zero joinButton.style.cssText in socketClient.js", "socketClient.js:115 'No open lobbies' innerHTML uses .empty-hint empty-hint--lg, no inline style", "renderMyStats empty case uses .empty-hint.empty-hint--lg, no inline style", "renderDailyResult empty case uses .empty-hint.empty-hint--sm, no inline style", "5 new tests pass", "Sacrosanct test files unchanged", "Suite 600 -> 605 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: index.html static-style migration + .demo-item orphan deletion + 14 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrate 13 static `style="..."` attrs in `index.html` to existing/new classes; add 2 new rules to `02-hero-lobby.css` (`#join-panel .input-group-vertical` + `#join-btn`); append 6 new rules to `04-modals.css`; DELETE inline `<style>` block at `index.html:79-82` AND DELETE 5 dead `.demo-item` rules at `02-hero-lobby.css:131-143` (the one intentional dead-code excision). New file-content test pins the post-state.

**Files:**
- Modify: `public/index.html` (12 attr replacements + 2 class additions + 1 wrapper class + delete L79-82)
- Modify: `public/css/02-hero-lobby.css` (append 2 rules; DELETE L131-143)
- Modify: `public/css/04-modals.css` (append 6 rules)
- Create: `client-tests/index-inline-styles.test.js` (~14 tests — per-rule assertions for clearer failures)

**Spec selector correction:** Plan uses `#join-panel .input-group-vertical` (correct) instead of spec §4.1's `.lobby-discover-section .input-group-vertical` (no such class exists). Documented in plan.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- index.html has zero style="..." attrs
- index.html <head> has no inline <style> block
- #team-start-btn and #chat-badge have class hidden
- 02-hero-lobby.css has #join-panel .input-group-vertical + #join-btn rules
- 02-hero-lobby.css has no .demo-item or .animate-demo selectors
- 04-modals.css has 6 new rules (replay-tutorial-row, #replay-tutorial-btn, #leaderboard-list, combined my-stats/daily-result body, .daily-result-actions, combined daily-result buttons)
- 14 new tests pass
- git diff --stat shows zero sacrosanct file changes
- Suite 605 → 619 green

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/index-inline-styles.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent && git diff --stat origin/main -- client-tests/ server/` → 14 green, 619 total, sacrosanct diff-stat shows only the 3 new client-test files.

**Steps:** TDD — write failing test file FIRST, verify RED, then append rules + 13 attr migrations + 2 class additions + delete inline <style> block + delete 5 dead .demo-item rules, verify GREEN, commit. Full code in plan T2 Steps 1-5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/index.html", "public/css/02-hero-lobby.css", "public/css/04-modals.css", "client-tests/index-inline-styles.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/index-inline-styles.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent && git diff --stat origin/main -- client-tests/ server/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["index.html has zero style=... attrs", "index.html head has no inline style block", "#team-start-btn and #chat-badge have class hidden", "02-hero-lobby.css has #join-panel .input-group-vertical + #join-btn rules", "02-hero-lobby.css has no .demo-item or .animate-demo selectors", "04-modals.css has 6 new rules (replay-tutorial-row, #replay-tutorial-btn, #leaderboard-list, combined my-stats/daily-result body, .daily-result-actions, combined daily-result buttons)", "14 new tests pass", "git diff --stat shows zero sacrosanct file changes", "Suite 605 -> 619 green"]}
```
